variants.title: Fleetguard AF25957 Air Filter, Primary Magnum Rs | Replaces the Donaldson DBA5226
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF25957 Magnum RS™ radial seal primary air element is designed to meet the rugged demands of equipment operating in the harshest environments.  The Magnum RS offers unique features that provide significant benefits for longer service life and optimum performance when the job demands it.

variants.title: Donaldson DBA5226 Air Primary Donaldson Blue
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson DBA5226 Air Primary Donaldson Blue is engineered to deliver reliable performance and durability across a wide range of applications. Designed with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality while meeting demanding operational requirements. Whether used in industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty settings, this component offers dependable operation and longevity. Its versatile design makes it suitable for various uses, supporting system efficiency and overall performance.
